decision: The historical Wave-1 aggregate debit was 332 -> 266 B (-66 B). The source-stream lifetime correction raised the candidate to 369 B over the release target; the owner-authorized stager and chain-walker correction consumes 15 B and pins the current candidate at 354 B. Against the sealed v1.0.1 baseline this remains a 22 B credit, so the current R3 capacity delta carries no authorization; both historical debits remain visible in their bound receipts.
